summary: R-1 is resolved. design.md:5 now includes both omitted suites; lines 97 and 101–105 require migration of all four test callers, including explicit shared reference time plus derived jwt_exp in test_codex_credentials.py and now-accepting poll stubs in test_entry_point.py. Repository-wide caller inspection supports that inventory. The fix introduces no new critical or high-severity design issue.
